---
title: "ST — Science & Technology Lgndiary"
subtitle: "A science and technology diary by LGND AI"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, image]
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

Technical notes at the intersection of **geospatial AI**, **foundation model embeddings**, and **uncertainty estimation** — by [LGND AI](https://lgnd.ai) / [EarthLegend](https://github.com/EarthLegend).

Our core approach: *linear probes on frozen embeddings* — revealing what signals are already linearly accessible in a model's internal representations, without retraining anything.

---
